creator: vegeta@tuxpowered.net
text: I have some Intel xl710 running failover lagg and I had an issue not totally unlike this one. One of ports in lagg (and always the same one, unless they were added in different order, then both would always work) would only send frames but never receive them, so the router would become master on carp on vlans on this lagg, never seeing carp advertisements of the primary router. That was on FreeBSD 11.0, though. I used ixgbe-2.5.15 from Intel instead of the one coming with Kernel and the issue was gone.
